reply: (1) This is a Square D Motor Control Center Panel MCC-003, used to control and protect motor circuits. (2) The phase rotation monitor tripped likely due to incorrect phase sequence or a phase imbalance. (3) The tech should check the phase sequence and verify the motor's direction of rotation. For an unknown fault, the tech should start by checking the voltage and current readings on the panel to ensure they match the specifications and are within safe limits.
